probable_causes_for_jobs0: YAML at this SHA is present and includes 'push'/'workflow_dispatch' so YAML misconfiguration is unlikely.
Transient GitHub Actions backend issue where the run record exists but jobs were not scheduled or logs not retained (matches observed HTTP 404).
A mismatch between the event timing and workflow content (e.g., run created while workflow update was in-flight) could produce runs with no jobs.
recommended_minimal_patch:
(DO NOT APPLY)
1) Add an early diagnostic step that always runs and uploads a tiny artifact to make job scheduling visible.
2) Add explicit 'permissions: contents: read' and an explicit 'concurrency' policy to reduce overlapping-run races.
3) If issue persists, collect failing run ids and open GitHub Support ticket with the run ids and this saved YAML.
